previousStarts.stewardsComment: Restrained into a peg line position shortly after the start of the event.
Broke gait on the turn out of the front straight after the start.
Lay inwards near the 900m contacting several track markers.
Pulled hard during the score up.
Gave ground to be beaten more than 71m.
Broke gait approaching the 1400m and again near the 1100m.
Caught wide early then worked forward to lead the one wide line thereafter.
